DailyFresh Prep
Our Legacy

Rooted in Tradition,
Served with Pride

Shaahi Biryani was born from a deep love for the rich culinary heritage of Hyderabad — a city where biryani isn't just food, it's an art form passed through generations of royal kitchens.

We source the finest long-grain basmati, grind our spices fresh each morning, and follow dum-cooking methods perfected over centuries.

🌾
Authentic RecipesTraditional Hyderabadi preparations unchanged since our founding.
✓
100% Halal & FreshHalal-certified meats prepared fresh daily with no preservatives.
♛
Community FirstProudly serving Plano and the DFW area for every occasion.
Events & Occasions

Royal Catering Services

From 100 to 5,000 guests — we bring the royal feast to your event.

💍
Weddings & Receptions

Large-tray service, custom menu planning, and on-time delivery for your most important day.

🎊
Festive Gatherings

Birthdays, anniversaries, engagements and festive occasions — full tray service with traditional sides.

🏢
Corporate & Private Events

Impress guests at office lunches, team dinners or private parties with fresh Hyderabadi cuisine.

Voices of Our Guests

What People Say

"
★★★★★

The Hyderabadi Goat Biryani is extraordinary — the saffron aroma fills the whole house. We order for every family gathering and it never disappoints.

— Fatima A., Plano TX
"
★★★★★

Ordered for our daughter's engagement celebration — the large tray plus Sheerqorma was a massive hit. Guests kept asking where the food was from. Truly royal.

— Tariq M., Frisco TX
"
★★★★★

Best biryani in DFW, no question. The spice balance is perfect — authentic Hyderabadi taste that reminds me of home. Shaahi is our family's go-to.

— Sana R., Allen TX
